name: content-hub
description: Content publishing, social media automation, and analytics tools for Kjetil's content pipeline

tools.name: post_tweet
tools.description: Post a tweet to X with optional media (image/video). Uses tweepy + OAuth. Follow brand-voice-skill.md format.
tools.usage:
post_tweet(text='the play:

1. step one
2. step two', image_path='/path/to/clip.mp4')

tools.name: publish_video
tools.description: Publish a video to YouTube/Instagram with Discord approval flow. Compresses preview, sends to #publish channel, waits for reaction.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image using Google Gemini API from a text prompt. Saves to content-hub/generated-images/.
tools.usage: generate_image(prompt='cinematic space background with nebula', output_path='/path/to/output.jpg')

tools.name: instagram_analytics
tools.description: Pull Instagram analytics for @kjetilfuras. Returns follower count, engagement rate, top performing posts.

tools.name: quote_tweet
tools.description: Post a quote tweet via Playwright browser automation. Uses saved X cookies. Creates proper embedded quote card.

tools.name: scan_viral_tweets
tools.description: Scan X for viral tweets in the AI/automation space using Playwright. Searches multiple queries, filters by engagement.

tools.name: search_reaction_clip
tools.description: Search YouTube for a short reaction clip (HD MP4) to attach to tweets. Downloads via yt-dlp, trimmed to specified duration.

tools.name: skool_airtable_sync
tools.description: Export Skool members via Playwright, diff against previous sync, upsert to Airtable. Tracks new/churned/upgraded members.

notes: Brand voice rules are in ~/code/content-hub/data/brand-voice-skill.md — READ BEFORE POSTING
X cookies for Playwright are in data/.x-cookies.json — if expired, run: node scripts/export-x-cookies.js
